channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping cornervof Muston Road, 18th March
item.description:
2 days of people leaving household rubbish by the tree- attracting foxes

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Collapsed drain, 18th March
item.description:
Drain has collapsed, someone stuck a cone on it which has now fallen Ito the drain
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Ringers Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Posters, 18th March
item.description:
Ugly posters on Wilko building

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous drain, 18th March
item.description:
Reported a month ago! Collapsed drain with metal sticking up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, High Street, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of household rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
2 days of household rubbish bring left by tree
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed fly-tipping, 18th March
item.description:
Bes fly-tipping on the pathway between Bridge Road and platform two entrance for Bexleyheath Railway Station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Child's desk, 18th March
item.description:
Dumped in footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Westhurst Drive, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 days of fly tipping, 18th March
item.description:
Pile is being added to each day- spreads across the street at times, rubbish then blows around. Foxes in the area as well as rats- started 5 days ago

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass needs cutting, 18th March
item.description:
Please cut the grass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gresham Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox in single parking bay, 18th March
item.description:
Dead fox has been placed into black bag by single parking bay

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Davern Close, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes overgrowing cycle/foot path, 18th March
item.description:
There are large bramble bushes that are overgrowing the cycle/foot path. These have not been back in several years. The section nearest the play park has been done but the section on both sides of the path towards Surrey quays needs attention. There is also a sofa dumped.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Somerfield Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 18th March
item.description:
Pillows, bedding, ironing board, dumped on green..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars being fixed on public highway in lincoln road, 18th March
item.description:
There is a res that is bringing cars back to there house, parking them all in this road and fixing them on the public highway. This is causing issues with other residents for parking and there's always mess on the pavements because of this. Please can this be looked into urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lincoln Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Major Potholes and rough surface, 18th March
item.description:
Very dangerous and deep potholes that are damaging vehicles. Spread along the High road (northbound) between Phillip Lane and Forster road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 381, High Road, West Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Next to Tesco, 18th March
item.description:
More dumped bags,could they be removed please? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Communal bins by Kings Crescent Estate, Queens Drive, 18th March
item.description:
This site is constantly used by fly tippers and the mess often spreads over the pavement. Currently all of the recycling bins are overflowing. It has been a continuous problem for years and presumably the bins need to be moved away from the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queens Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The wait button hasn’t worked since before Christmas, 18th March
item.description:
I have already reported this matter and have been told it’s fixed but it isn’t. As I said before, it is very dangerous to have the red man stuck on, without any hope at all of the green man appearing . The traffic runs smoothly because it doesn’t stop. Consequently everyone has to take their life in their hands and dash across. This is especially dangerous when crossing with children. It is outside a school and the leisure centre. Please mend this , otherwise you might be responsible for the death or injury of a child. If it is impossible to fix, tell everyone.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crook Log, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and broken furniture on the pavement, 18th March
item.description:
There are items left here almost every day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden pallets on the pavement, 18th March
item.description:
There are several wooden pallets along the pavement on Margaret Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Margaret Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multi purpose litter bun full. Situated by millpond and outside park., 18th March
item.description:
Full bin and overflowing. Possibly needs emptying more frequently in warner months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Vale, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
